_note: Arena M8 control-plane milestone. Tokens + turns + sessions mined by scripts/mine_build_metrics.py over the 2026-06-02 09:50->12:40 sprint window. LOC and wall-clock are git-diff/commit-derived (see below) because M8 EXTENDS existing arena files rather than landing as a single new tree, so the per-path --loc count alone (new modules only) understates the milestone.

loc._method: new-module files counted by mine_build_metrics.py (non-blank); milestone-diff figures from `git diff 5f80fe9..d6ce51a` (the two M8 code commits after the spec lock).

tests._method: `def test_` under fieldkit/tests/arena/test_jobs*.py (the dispatcher + API suite). M8 also added a payload_json leak sentinel to test_mirror_does_not_leak.py and reshaped test_harness_mcp.py to the 9-tool surface; the spec tallies 37 M8-touched cases total.

wall_clock._method: M8 milestone span: spec-lock commit 57f2155 -> release commit f50267f, 2026-06-02. (The mine's --commit-grep span is discarded; it matched the full arena history.)

first_commit.subject: docs(spec): write Arena M8 control-plane milestone

last_commit.subject: fieldkit v0.16.0: Arena content line M1-M8
